sourceTitle: Lessons from 1,000+ YC startups: Resilience, tar pit ideas, pivoting, more | Dalton Caldwell (Y Combinator, Managing Director)
text: app. Also, please consider giving us a rating or leaving a review as that really helps other listeners find the podcast. You can find all past episodes or learn more about the show at Lennyspodcast.com. See you in the next episode.
guestOnly: I have to say and they like the videos and apply to YC, I would love to fund their companies. **Dalton Caldwell** (01:20:24): Sure thing. Thanks so much, Lenny. Appreciate it.
